intro.title: Not your average
intro.p1: Heronissos Hotel has been completely reimagined. Terrazzo floors, oak-slat feature walls with warm indirect lighting, and handcrafted furniture — all within an all-inclusive formula with meals, drinks and snacks from morning until 23:00.
intro.p2: Located at the heart of Hersonissos, 50 metres from the beach and walking distance from everything — yet worlds apart from the noise.

experience.dayDesc: Step outside and find your spot. A sun lounger by the water, a book in the shade, or simply nothing at all. Two freshwater pools and black loungers are yours from morning until the last light fades over the Cretan hills. Some days, the best plan is no plan at all.
experience.nightDesc: As the heat of the day fades, the terrace comes alive. Pull up a stool, order a Raki sour, and let the evening take its time. Rattan lanterns cast a warm glow over the pool, the bar is open, the cocktails are flowing — and every last drop is included until midnight.

breakfast.label: Breakfast
breakfast.desc: Buffet-style breakfast until 10:00. Early breakfast on request.

lunch.label: Lunch
lunch.desc: Buffet-style lunch until 14:00. Lunch baskets for excursions.

snacks.label: Afternoon snacks
snacks.desc: Cakes and biscuits with hot beverages until 17:00.

items.name: Free Wi-Fi
items.desc: Full coverage in all areas and rooms.

items.name: 2 Outdoor Pools
items.desc: Freshwater pools with loungers and poolside bar.

items.name: Free Parking
items.desc: On-site free parking for all guests.

items.name: Excursions
items.desc: Knossos, Samaria Gorge, Santorini and more.

items.name: 24/7 Reception
items.desc: Concierge and security around the clock.

dining.title: Two venues,
dining.labyrinthDesc: Enriched buffet concept for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Special menus on request. Baby highchairs available.
dining.nissosDesc: The place to relax, sip and enjoy. Whether you're in search of serenity or a delectable drink — Nissos has it all.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.address:
14, Filonidou Zotou Street
Limenas Hersonissos 70014
Crete, Greece

footer.about: A redesigned all-inclusive boutique hotel in the heart of Hersonissos, Crete. Fully renovated in 2025.

crete.title: Crete. The island that
crete.desc: Ancient palaces, gorges cut through mountains, sun-bleached villages and a coastline that never looks the same twice. Hersonissos sits at the heart of it all — the perfect base to explore one of the Mediterranean's greatest islands.
